title: 🗺️ Google Maps Competitor Analyzer
description: 🔍 Discover competitors near any business location using Google Maps! Perfect for market research, site selection, and competitive analysis. Get detailed insights including ratings, reviews, rankings, and contact info for businesses in your target market. 🎯

inputMethod.title: 📝 Input Method
inputMethod.description: Choose how you want to enter your locations

searchQuery.title: 🔎 Search Category
searchQuery.description: 🏪 What type of businesses are you looking for? Be specific for best results! Examples: "restaurant", "coffee shop", "dentist", "gym", "hair salon", "auto repair", "pharmacy", "hotel"

city.title: 🏙️ City
city.description: Enter the city name (e.g., Seattle, Los Angeles, New York)

state.title: 📍 State
state.description: Enter the 2-letter state code (e.g., WA, CA, NY)

businessName.title: 🏢 Your Business Name
businessName.description: Optional: Enter your business name to identify it in the results

bulkLocations.title: 📋 Bulk Location Input
bulkLocations.description:
Paste multiple locations, one per line. Supported formats:

✅ **Full addresses**: 123 Main St, Seattle, WA 98101
✅ **City, State**: Seattle, WA
✅ **ZIP codes**: 98101
✅ **Place IDs**: ChIJ2eUgeAK6j4ARbn5u_wAGqWA
✅ **Coordinates**: 47.6062,-122.3321
✅ **With business names**: 123 Main St, Seattle, WA | My Business

💡 Tip: Use pipe (|) to separate address from business name

locations.title: 📍 Advanced Location Input
locations.description: For power users: Enter locations with full control over format

maxCompetitors.title: 📊 Maximum Competitors per Location
maxCompetitors.description: 🎯 How many nearby competitors do you want to analyze? Google Maps typically shows 20-30 businesses in a search area. More competitors = more comprehensive analysis!

verbose.title: 🔧 Debug Mode
verbose.description: 🐛 Enable detailed logging to troubleshoot issues. This shows exactly how the scraper parses each business listing - useful if you're getting unexpected results!

proxyConfiguration.title: 🌐 Proxy Settings
proxyConfiguration.description: 🛡️ Use residential proxies to avoid rate limits and blocks. Highly recommended when analyzing multiple locations or running frequently!
